details:
1 validation error for NextStep
function.search.limit
  Input should be less than or equal to 10000 [type=less_than_equal, input_value=100000, input_type=int]
    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/less_than_equal

VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.house_mesh_juniper_ssd
alias: house_mesh_juniper_ssd
purchased_on: 2026-02-07
total_eur: 105
counterparty: Datenspeicher Köhler GmbH
project: House Mesh
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: 2 TB SATA SSD
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 89
    line_eur: 89
  - item: USB clone adapter
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 16
    line_eur: 16
---
# Juniper storage refresh

```text
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| field          | value                       |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                        |
| bill_id        | bill.house_mesh_juniper_ssd |
| alias          | house_mesh_juniper_ssd      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-02-07                  |
| total_eur      | 105                         |
| counterparty   | Datenspeicher Köhler GmbH   |
| project        | House Mesh                  |
| related_entity | Juniper                     |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | 2 TB SATA SSD     | 1   | 89       | 89       |
| 2 | USB clone adapter | 1   | 16       | 16       |
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL             |     |          | 105      |
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Part boring maintenance, part trust-building because Juniper backups were becoming real household infrastructure.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request ('OCR all bills related to Juniper'). I resolved Juniper via canonical entity data, located the related bill record, added YAML frontmatter per finance schema while preserving the original body verbatim, and then deleted the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.md, context), inspected 99_system workflows/schemas before task work, treated inbox as request not truth, resolved entity through canonical cast file, used finance schema for required bill fields, preserved original bill body under new frontmatter, and deleted inbox file after full completion per inbox-processing-v2-update.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md requested OCR for all bills related to Juniper. Canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/juniper.md provided the identifier, finance search found the related bill file 50_finance/purchases/2026_02_07__eur_000105__bill__house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md, and that file was updated with required YAML fields from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md while keeping the original text intact. Cleanup completed by deleting the processed inbox item.
